ws.meta.title: Wallet Sweep
ws.meta.description: Drain native coin and ERC20 tokens out of many EOAs into one wallet using EIP-7702. A relay wallet you fund does the upgrade and sweep — no passkey, no login.
ws.title: Wallet Sweep
ws.subtitle: Vacuum native + ERC20 from many wallets into one — no passkey, no login. A relay wallet you control does the on-chain work, powered by EIP-7702.
ws.security.title: Your keys stay in this browser
ws.security.body: Pasted private keys never leave your device and are never stored. A throwaway relay wallet (which you download) does the on-chain work — you fund it with gas, and it can only send assets to the destination you set. No passkey or login needed.
ws.relay.title: Relay wallet
ws.relay.subtitle: A throwaway wallet that does the on-chain work. Download it, prove you saved it, then fund it with gas.
ws.relay.downloadHint: You need this to fund the relay and recover leftover gas. It can only ever send assets to your destination.
ws.relay.verifyHint: Re-upload the file you just downloaded — we check it matches before revealing the funding address.
ws.relay.fundHint: Send the amount below to the relay address. It covers contract deploys, the upgrade, the sweep and the fee.
ws.network.title: Choose a network
ws.network.subtitle: Any chain that supports EIP-7702. Add a custom one if yours isn't listed.
ws.keys.title: Private keys
ws.keys.subtitle: Paste one private key per line. We derive each address locally.
ws.tokens.title: Tokens to sweep
ws.tokens.subtitle: Native coin is always swept. Add any ERC20 contracts to include them.
ws.dest.title: Destination
ws.dest.subtitle: Where all swept assets are sent.
ws.run.title: Review & run
ws.fee.label: Fee
ws.done.title: Sweep complete
ws.done.subtitle: Assets moved to your destination. Wallets stay upgraded for one-tap future sweeps.
ws.revoke.title: Revoke delegations
ws.revoke.subtitle: Reset upgraded wallets back to plain EOAs. Needs the private keys present.
ws.history.title: History
ws.logs.title: Activity
ws.fee.title: Service fee
ws.fee.subtitle: A service fee (about $5 in the network's coin) is included in the relay funding for each sweep. Network gas and other on-chain costs are separate.
ws.req.keys: at least one valid private key
ws.dest.invalid: That doesn't look like a valid address
ws.relay.rotateBody: This replaces the current relay key. Any gas already sent to the old address stays there — recover it first, or keep its downloaded file to reach it later.
ws.revoke.confirmBody: {count} wallets will be reset back to plain EOAs. This can't be undone.
